creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?query=firefox&stype=name&sektion=www> includes this, amongst the requirements for firefox-108.0.1_2,2: 

* python27-2.7.18_2. 

<https://www.freshports.org/www/firefox/> and <https://www.freshports.org/lang/python27/> show 108.0.1_2,2 and 2.7.18_2 as current versions, however, as far as I can tell: 

* www/firefox neither directly, nor indirectly, requires lang/python27 
  to build or run. 

From <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/ports.cgi?stype=faq>: 

> The script ports.cgi use the file INDEX-13 as database for its 
> operations. INDEX-13 is updated automatically every two hours.
